genericWording.definition: A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
An ark; a chest or vessel, especially Noah's ark or the ark of the covenant according to context.
A bed; a place of lying down, and by extension a channel or layer according to context.
A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
A board is a plank or flat piece of timber; to board is to cover or furnish with boards according to context.
A bow; a weapon for shooting arrows, and also to bend or stoop according to context.
A brother by birth, kinship, nation, or close covenant relation, according to context.
A charge; command, duty, cost, or accusation, and also to command or entrust according to context.
A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
A field; open land, cultivated ground, or the scene of action according to context.
A following; those who go after or attend one; also the act of coming after, according to context.
A host; an army, a great company, or a heavenly company according to context.
A house, household, family line, or dwelling place, according to context.
A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
A man; a human being, or a male person in particular, according to context.
A measure; a standard or quantity, and also to measure according to context.
A pan is a shallow vessel or utensil for cooking, carrying fire, or holding something according to context.
A pit; a hole, cistern, snare, grave-like place, or place of destruction according to context.
A rod; a staff, scepter, instrument of correction, or sign of authority according to context.
A preposition marking relation in place, time, manner, cause, or degree according to context.
A woman; an adult female, whether wife or not according to context.
A verb expressing willingness, customary action, or consequence according to context.
